body_txt: Simply put, a character fakes being drunk. This is often a way of achieving Obfuscating Stupidity . Variants: The person's pretending to be high. They may even be a tad buzzed / high to complete the effect. The character may also be a Functional Addict who is playing up the side effects of their vice of choice to fly under the radar as an Addled Addict . This is an Invoked Trope form of Mistaken for Drunk or Mistaken for Junkie , since the character is intentionally making people think they're more intoxicated than they actually are. Compare Fake High , where the character thinks they're drunk or high when they're not.
